title: Samchawk
compiled_truth: Samchawk is an external contact at [AOL](companies/aol). Over the corpus period (1999-09-16 to 2002-01-23), Samchawk sent 14 and received 14 emails, totalling 28 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (14), [Iborstein](people/iborstein-aol) (3), [Sgaffen](people/sgaffen-ncninc) (3), [Jg922](people/jg922-aol) (3), [Dstein009](people/dstein009-aol) (3).
